title: Creation / Adam
similarities: Humanity is specially created by God.
The first humans dwell in a garden-like setting.
Disobedience leads to exile from ease.
Divine guidance continues after the fall.

differences.description: Christian readings often connect Adam to doctrines of sin and redemption through Christ.
Qur’anic framing stresses repentance and guidance without inherited guilt.

commentary_notes: Creation narratives ground each tradition’s view of human purpose.
A timeline view can later link Adam traditions with prophetic succession.
